title: Grobot Runtime Tool Quality v1
description: Canonical registry for runtime-tool quality status, reason, and action classification fields shared by status --json and release reports.

action_families.description: Runtime binary, health, or environment readiness must be fixed.
Runtime and gateway tool schema projections drifted or could not be compared.
Tool schema budget is unknown or violated.
Runtime recovery readiness gate blocked or warned.
Recent runtime tool recovery health is degraded.
Runtime-tool contract runner or describe contract coverage failed.
Runtime-tool diagnostics or report parsing failed.

action_required.description: Build or install the Rust runtime binary before using runtime-backed tools.

default_next_step.status: Build or install the Rust runtime binary, then rerun `grobot status --json`.
default_next_step.release: Build the Rust runtime with `cargo build --manifest-path runtime/Cargo.toml`, then rerun the release gate.

action_required.description: Inspect runtime healthcheck failure and retry status.

default_next_step.status: Inspect runtime health failure, then rerun `grobot status --json`.

action_required.description: Run runtime-tool contract suite and reconcile schema drift.

default_next_step.status: Run `npm run check:gateway:runtime-tools:describe` and reconcile runtime.tools.describe with gateway projection.

action_required.description: Reduce visible tool schema surface or update budget contract.

default_next_step.status: Trim the runtime tool schema surface or update the schema budget policy, then rerun runtime-tool contracts.
default_next_step.release: Trim the runtime tool schema surface or update the schema budget policy, then rerun runtime-tool contracts.

action_required.description: Review runtime recovery readiness gate blockers or warnings.

default_next_step.status: Review runtime recovery gate blockers or warnings before expanding automated recovery.

action_required.description: Restore runtime.tools.describe availability so status no longer depends on fallback projection.

default_next_step.status: Restore runtime.tools.describe availability so status no longer depends on gateway fallback projection.

action_required.description: Run runtime describe compatibility checks to verify schema projection drift.

default_next_step.status: Run runtime describe compatibility checks to verify schema projection drift.

action_required.description: Review recent runtime tool recovery timeline and clear repeated failures.

default_next_step.status: Review recent runtime tool recovery timeline and clear repeated failures before expanding automation.

action_required.description: Fix release report parsing or runner output JSON.

default_next_step.release: Fix runtime-tool release report JSON parsing, then rerun `bash scripts/core-release-gate.sh --report <path>`.
Fix runtime-tool diagnostics self-test, then rerun `node scripts/check-runtime-tool-contracts.mjs --include-runtime-describe --json`.

action_required.description: Run the failed runtime-tool contract from failed_contract_detail.suggested_command.

default_next_step.release: Run the failed runtime-tool contract and fix its output before rerunning the release gate.

action_required.description: Ensure every runtime-tool contract completes in the release runner.

default_next_step.release: Restore runtime-tool contract coverage so every registered contract completes in the release runner.

action_required.description: Register missing runtime-tool contract in scripts/check-runtime-tool-contracts.mjs.
Replace fixed /tmp fixtures with isolated per-process temp paths.

default_next_step.release: Replace fixed /tmp runtime-tool fixtures with isolated per-process temp paths.

action_required.description: Restore runtime schema budget evidence in describe/governance payload.

default_next_step.release: Restore runtime schema budget evidence in runtime.tools.describe governance payload.
